assays.assay_desc: Binding affinity to DNA-tagged recombinant TGTA (unknown origin) measured after 1 hr by biotinylated-ligand affinity bead-based qPCR analysis
Binding affinity to TGTA (unknown origin) assessed as dissociation constant by KINOMEscan analysis
Binding affinity to TGTB (unknown origin) assessed as dissociation constant by KINOMEscan analysis
Inhibition of full-length human recombinant BTK using FITC-Ahx-TSELKKVVALYDYMPMNAND-NH2 as substrate measured after 60 mins by caliper assay
Inhibition of BTK in vitamin D3 differentiated human THP1 cells assessed as inhibition of FCgammaR-induced IL8 production measured after 24 hrs by HTRF assay

Inhibition of BTK in human B cells assessed as reduction in anti-IgM/IL4-stimulated CD69 expression on B cells preincubated for 60 mins followed by anti-IgM antibody/IL4 stimulation and measured after 16 hrs by flow cytometry
Binding affinity to DNA-tagged recombinant BTK (unknown origin) measured after 1 hr by biotinylated-ligand affinity bead-based qPCR analysis
Binding affinity to DNA-tagged recombinant BMX (unknown origin) measured after 1 hr by biotinylated-ligand affinity bead-based qPCR analysis

Intrinsic clearance in rat liver microsomes
Half life in human plasma
Permeability of the compound at pH 6.8 by PAMPA
Inhibition of CYP2D6 (unknown origin)
Inhibition of CYP3A4 (unknown origin)
Inhibition of CYP2C9 (unknown origin)
Transactivation of PXR (unknown origin) assessed as induction of CYP3A activity by reporter gene assay
In vivo protein occupancy at BTK in OFA-1 rat spleen assessed as reduction in biotinylated-BTK probe binding at 3 mg/kg, po administered as single dose measured at 5 hrs by ELISA relative to control
In vivo protein occupancy at BTK in po dosed OFA-1 rat spleen assessed as reduction in biotinylated-BTK probe binding measured at 5 hrs by ELISA
In vivo protein occupancy at BTK in po dosed OFA-1 rat spleen assessed as reduction in biotinylated-BTK probe binding measured at 5 hrs by ELISA

In vivo protein occupancy at BTK in SRBC immunized OFA-1 rat spleen assessed as reduction in biotinylated-BTK probe binding at 3 mg/kg, po administered once daily for 4 days starting post-immunization and measured after 24 hrs by ELISA relative to control

In vivo protein occupancy at BTK in SRBC immunized OFA-1 rat spleen assessed as reduction in biotinylated-BTK probe binding at 0.3 mg/kg, po administered once daily for 4 days starting post-immunization and measured after 24 hrs by ELISA relative to control

In vivo protein occupancy at BTK in Lewis rat model of collagen-induced arthritis assessed as reduction in biotinylated-BTK probe binding at 3 mg/kg, po administered once daily starting from day 12 to day 25 post-immunization and measured 24 hrs post last dose by ELISA relative to control
In vivo protein occupancy at BTK in OFA-1 rat spleen assessed as reduction in biotinylated-BTK probe binding at 1 mg/kg, po administered as single dose measured at 5 hrs by ELISA relative to control

Antiinflammatory activity in SRBC immunized OFA-1 rat assessed as reduction in anti-IgM response in splenocytes at 3 mg/kg, po administered once daily for 4 days starting post-immunization and measured on day 5 by plaque formation assay relative to control

Antiarthritic activity in Lewis rat model of collagen-induced arthritis assessed as reduction in paw swelling at 3 to 30 mg/kg, po administered once daily starting from day 12 to day 25 post-immunization and measured thrice a week during compound dosing relative to control
